mainEntity.name: How should I structure my content so it’s easy for AI Overviews to understand and quote my answers?

acceptedAnswer.text:
To structure content for AI Overviews, turn each page into a series of clearly labeled questions (H2/H3) followed by 2–3 sentence direct answers, then add supporting detail below. Make each answer paragraph self‑contained so AI can quote it without context.

AI systems prefer skimmable, well‑organized pages that mirror how people ask and think about the topic. Headings like “What is…?”, “How does… work?”, and “Is… worth it?” work well.

Key factors:
- Question‑style headings every ~200 words
- Short summary paragraphs at the top of each section
- Bullet lists for steps, pros/cons, or key points
- FAQ sections answering related micro‑questions

When rewriting, imagine your page being broken into cards: every card should make sense on its own and answer one specific question. Avoid walls of text and vague headings.

This structure not only helps AI Overviews but also improves user comprehension and engagement.
acceptedAnswer.description: Use question‑based H2/H3 headings and start each section with a 2–3 sentence direct answer, followed by details and bullet lists. Make every answer paragraph self‑contained so AI can safely quote it. This question‑and‑answer structure is ideal for AI Overviews.
